_comment: Branch protection ruleset for the main branch.
To apply: GitHub UI → Settings → Rules → Rulesets → Import a ruleset.
After importing, verify the two required status checks are sourced from
'GitHub Actions' in the UI — the integration_id below targets the GitHub
Actions app but should be confirmed after import.
Required status checks correspond to job 'name:' fields in ci.yaml:
'Tests passed'   — job: tests-passed (aggregates all test + lint jobs)
'Coverage report' — job: coverage (only passes if all test jobs passed)
If you add a new required check or rename a job, update this file and
re-import, or apply the change manually in Settings → Rules → Rulesets.
name: Protect main

rules._comment: Prevent direct deletion of the main branch.
Prevent force-pushes to main, preserving linear history.
All changes must arrive via a pull request. No approvals are
rules._comment2: required (solo project), but the PR process is enforced to

rules._comment: CI must pass before merging. 'Tests passed' is a summary job
rules._comment2: that aggregates all matrix test jobs and the lint job, so adding
rules._comment3: new OS/Python versions to the matrix does not require updating
rules._comment4: this ruleset. See ci.yaml job 'tests-passed' for details.

rules._comment: Require a linear commit history (squash or rebase merges only).
rules._comment2: Keeps main history clean and makes git log/bisect easier.
